benefits.description: Huge change in knees; constant clicking joints substantially improved
Lost 97 lbs prior to GLP intervention; eventually used GLP for food noise and binge eating support

protocol_notes: M20. Lost 97 lbs before GLP intervention. Had bad joints from years of being significantly overweight. Used BPC/TB for joint recovery. Cautious about over-reliance on peptides; recommends lifestyle-first approach especially for young people. Also mentions GHK, nootropics, MOTC, SS31 but did not personally report using them.
